landing.title: Smart Classroom
landing.description: Smart Classroom keeps courses, assignments, submissions, and classroom progress in one clean workspace.

preview.teacherValue: Course planning, assignment publishing, and grading in one organized flow.
preview.studentValue: Coursework, deadlines, and submissions presented in a clear academic view.
preview.flowValue: Assignments, submissions, and classroom activity stay synchronized through the API layer.

highlights.roleDashboardsDescription: Teacher and student dashboards are separated into focused workflows.
highlights.postgresDescription: A solid relational foundation for academic data and future growth.
highlights.authDescription: JWT-based authentication with protected routes and role-aware access.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to the workspace that matches your role.
auth.registerDescription: Create a teacher or student account to unlock the right dashboard.
auth.spotlightLoginTitle: Return to your classroom workspace without the noise.
auth.spotlightLoginDescription: A cleaner sign-in flow for teacher and student workspaces, with role-aware routing and reliable session handling.
auth.spotlightRegisterTitle: Create a Smart Classroom account for focused daily work.
auth.spotlightRegisterDescription: Set up your role once and continue into the matching dashboard with a consistent experience.
auth.loginBullet1: Teacher and student access stays separate and role-aware.
auth.loginBullet2: Coursework, deadlines, and reviews are available right after sign-in.
auth.loginBullet3: Session state, redirects, and protected routes stay in sync.
auth.registerBullet1: Teacher accounts manage courses, assignments, and grading.
auth.registerBullet2: Student accounts join courses, submit work, and track progress.
auth.registerBullet3: Account setup is short, clear, and ready for daily use.
auth.passwordHint: Use at least 6 characters for your password.
auth.studentDescription: Track courses, deadlines, submissions, and grades.
auth.teacherDescription: Manage courses, assignments, and grading queues.
auth.validationFixErrors: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
auth.validationSubmitFailed: Unable to submit the form right now. Please try again.
auth.validationNameLength: Full name must be at least 3 characters.
auth.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.validationPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.loginSuccess: Sign-in successful. Redirecting to your dashboard...
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. Redirecting to your dashboard...

nav.workspaceDescription: Course operations, assignments, and submissions in one place.

guard.preparingDescription: We are restoring your session and verifying access permissions.

teacherDashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard
teacherDashboard.description: Courses, assignments, reviews, and classroom activity in one focused workspace.
teacherDashboard.heroTitle: Run your classes from one clear operational view.
teacherDashboard.heroDescription: Monitor course load, review queues, selected course context, and recent activity without jumping across screens.
teacherDashboard.overviewEmptyDesc: Create a course, publish an assignment, or wait for activity to start building this overview.
teacherDashboard.focusUpcomingDeadlinesDesc: {count} assignments need attention in the next 7 days.
teacherDashboard.focusNoSubmissionsDesc: New student work will appear here once it is submitted.
teacherDashboard.performanceDesc: Average grade trend across your latest graded assignments.
teacherDashboard.performanceEmptyDesc: Performance trends will appear after submissions receive grades.
teacherDashboard.submissionsTrendDesc: Daily submission volume across your classes in the last 7 days.
teacherDashboard.submissionsTrendEmptyDesc: This chart will populate after students start submitting work.
teacherDashboard.analyticsPanelDesc: Track student support needs, delays, and course risk areas from real submissions and progress data.
teacherDashboard.supportStudentsHelper: Students with low scores or heavy pending work
teacherDashboard.supportStudentsCaption: Real counts from grades and missing submissions
teacherDashboard.topStudentsHelper: Students with the strongest recent scores
teacherDashboard.delayedStudentsHelper: Students with overdue or late work
teacherDashboard.delayedStudentsCaption: Based on due dates and submission timing
teacherDashboard.courseRiskCaption: Completion is calculated from real student progress
teacherDashboard.topStudentsDesc: Students currently leading the strongest academic results.
teacherDashboard.topStudentsEmptyDesc: This list will fill after graded work accumulates.
teacherDashboard.supportStudentsDesc: Learners showing low performance or a heavy pending workload.
teacherDashboard.supportStudentsEmptyDesc: Support signals will appear when risk patterns emerge.
teacherDashboard.delayedStudentsDesc: Students with overdue work or repeated late submissions.
teacherDashboard.delayedStudentsEmptyDesc: Late submission patterns will appear here if they develop.
teacherDashboard.courseRiskDesc: Courses where assignment completion is lagging behind expectations.
teacherDashboard.courseRiskEmptyDesc: Courses will appear here only when real completion rates drop.
teacherDashboard.assignmentRiskDesc: Assignments with the lowest average grades across graded submissions.
teacherDashboard.assignmentRiskEmptyDesc: This list will appear after assignments receive enough grades.
teacherDashboard.loadErrorTitle: Unable to load the teacher dashboard
teacherDashboard.partialErrorTitle: Some dashboard data could not be refreshed
teacherDashboard.coursePortfolioDesc: A high-level view of all teacher-managed courses.
teacherDashboard.noCoursesDesc: Create your first course to start organizing assignments and student enrollment.
teacherDashboard.recentAssignmentsDesc: The latest coursework published across your classes.
teacherDashboard.noAssignmentsDesc: Assignments will appear here once you publish coursework.
teacherDashboard.recentSubmissionsDesc: Latest student deliveries across your courses.
teacherDashboard.noSubmissionsDesc: Incoming student work will appear here after assignments are submitted.
teacherDashboard.activityTimelineDesc: A concise record of your recent classroom actions.
teacherDashboard.noActivityDesc: Course creation, assignment publishing, and grading will appear here.

studentDashboard.title: Student Dashboard
studentDashboard.description: Courses, deadlines, submissions, and progress in one clear workspace.
studentDashboard.heroTitle: Stay on top of coursework from one organized dashboard.
studentDashboard.heroDescription: Focus on enrolled courses, upcoming deadlines, recent submissions, and score trends without extra clutter.
studentDashboard.overviewEmptyDesc: Join a course and start submitting work to populate this overview with real activity.
studentDashboard.heroMeta3: Soft motion and polished loading states
studentDashboard.metricAverageEmptyDesc: Your average score will appear after a teacher grades your first submission.
studentDashboard.focusNextDeadlineNoneDesc: No upcoming assignments are waiting right now.
studentDashboard.focusAverageScoreDesc: Calculated from your latest graded assignments.
studentDashboard.focusNoSubmissionsDesc: Your recent delivery will appear here after the first submission.
studentDashboard.performanceDesc: Track how your scores move across recent graded assignments.
studentDashboard.performanceEmptyDesc: Performance history appears after your work starts getting graded.
studentDashboard.submissionTrendDesc: See how many submissions you completed during the last 7 days.
studentDashboard.submissionTrendEmptyDesc: Your weekly submission pattern will appear after you submit work.
studentDashboard.analyticsPanelDesc: A focused read on your current momentum, consistency, and course-level progress.
studentDashboard.consistencyCaption: Calculated from assignments that have already reached their due date
studentDashboard.trendCaption: Changed by {delta} points across recent graded work
studentDashboard.trendNoData: More graded submissions are needed to estimate a trend.
studentDashboard.pendingThisWeekHelper: Pending assignments in the next 7 days
studentDashboard.pendingThisWeekCaption: Use this to prioritize near-term work
studentDashboard.loadErrorTitle: Unable to load the student dashboard
studentDashboard.analyticsErrorTitle: Progress analytics are unavailable right now
studentDashboard.upcomingAssignmentsDesc: Work ordered by due date to keep students focused.
studentDashboard.noPendingDesc: You are fully caught up or no new assignments have been posted yet.
studentDashboard.courseSpacesDesc: A quick overview of the classrooms you are enrolled in.
studentDashboard.noCoursesDesc: Course cards will appear here once you join a class.
studentDashboard.recentSubmissionsDesc: Your latest delivered work, organized for review.
studentDashboard.noSubmissionsDesc: Completed work will appear here after you submit assignments.
studentDashboard.recentActivityDesc: A quick timeline of your latest platform actions.
studentDashboard.noActivityDesc: Actions such as joining a course or submitting work will appear here.

teacherWorkspace.courseTitleRequired: Add a course title before continuing.

teacherWorkspace.courseCodeAutoHint: The course code is generated automatically after creation.

teacherWorkspace.courseCreateError: Unable to create the course right now.
teacherWorkspace.selectCourseHint: Select or create a course to continue.
teacherWorkspace.selectAssignmentHint: Select an assignment to open the grading queue.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentSectionDesc: Publish work for the selected course and review due dates in one place.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentTitleRequired: Add an assignment title before publishing.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentDueDateRequired: Select a due date before publishing.

teacherWorkspace.assignmentSelectCourse: Choose a course before creating an assignment.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentsLoadError: Unable to load assignments for this course.
teacherWorkspace.reviewSectionDesc: Grade submitted work and add feedback without leaving the dashboard.

teacherWorkspace.reviewFeedbackPlaceholder: Add a short note for the student.
teacherWorkspace.reviewNoSubmissionCopy: No submission has been sent yet.
teacherWorkspace.noSubmissionsDesc: Student work for this assignment will appear here as soon as it is submitted.
teacherWorkspace.studentRosterDesc: Students currently enrolled in the selected course.
teacherWorkspace.studentRosterEmptyDesc: Students who join with the course code will appear here.
teacherWorkspace.activitySectionDesc: Live classroom events across joins, assignments, submissions, and grading.

studentWorkspace.courseSectionDesc: Join with a course code, then switch between enrolled classes.
studentWorkspace.joinCourseCodeRequired: Enter a course code to continue.
studentWorkspace.joinCoursePlaceholder: Enter the code shared by your teacher
studentWorkspace.selectCourseHint: Join or select a course to view assignments.
studentWorkspace.assignmentSectionDesc: Everything due in the selected course, with direct submission support.
studentWorkspace.assignmentsLoadError: Unable to load assignments for this course.
studentWorkspace.submissionContentRequired: Add your submission content before sending it.
studentWorkspace.submissionInputRequired: Add submission text or attach a file before sending it.
studentWorkspace.submissionPlaceholder: Paste your answer, summary, or link here.
studentWorkspace.submissionFileHint: Optional: upload one file if your assignment needs a document or image.
studentWorkspace.activitySectionDesc: Recent events from your courses and submissions.

activityFeed.emptyDescription: Recent classroom actions will appear here as they happen.

insightsPanel.title: Student intelligence
insightsPanel.description: A short read on risk, support needs, and strong momentum across the class.
insightsPanel.emptyDescription: Student signals will appear after courses, submissions, and grades start building up.
insightsPanel.studentEmptyDescription: Summary metrics will appear here after more real classroom activity is available.
